subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter which thou didst address to Muhammad-Taqí, that faithful servant of the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بجناب محمد تقی بنده صادق جمال مبارک مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @service to others; to the Cause of God
